positive: A highly stylized, symmetrical cosmic forest silhouette scene. The main subject features giant, stylized bioluminescent mushrooms and meandering crystalline trees forming a deep jungle canopy. The ground is dotted with geometrically arranged constellations and floating nebula dust. The palette is dominated by deep indigo, vibrant teal, and accents of glowing gold. The style is perfect blend of vector illustration, Art Nouveau elegance, and ethereal sci-fi graphic design. The composition must be perfectly centered and balanced, with strong, clean silhouettes against a subtly gradient background. Focus on hard lines, minimal shading, and maximum visual contrast, ideal for merchandise printing.
